cards.title: Spotify and Universal Music Enable AI Cover Creation
cards.body: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists will receive a share of the revenue from these fan-made creations.

cards.title: Google Search Overhaul Brings Major AI Changes
cards.body: Google is significantly redesigning its search experience with expanded AI overview features. Users looking for alternatives may want to explore other search engines.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as the reason for the delay.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Podcast Features and Briefs
cards.body: Spotify is introducing AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features for podcasts. Users can generate daily or weekly briefs based on custom prompts.

cards.title: Spotify Launches NotebookLM Competitor App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop research app as a preview in 20+ markets. The tool directly competes with Google's NotebookLM for research and note-taking.

cards.title: Spotify Releases ElevenLabs Audiobook Tool
cards.body: Spotify has launched an AI-powered audiobook generation tool powered by ElevenLabs. Authors retain full freedom to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere without exclusivity contracts.

cards.title: The Path Launches AI Therapy Platform
cards.body: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alumni, debuts an AI therapy tool scoring 95 on mental health safety benchmarks. This far exceeds consumer AI bots, which score around 65.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI Interface
cards.body: Hark is developing a secretive multimodal AI platform launching this summer. The startup plans to create specialized hardware devices to power personal AI assistants.

cards.title: Google Pitches AI Agent Ecosystem to Consumers
cards.body: Google introduced AI agents at I/O as a new way for consumers to interact with the web. The presentation was promising but confusing for average users.

cards.title: AI Recycling Startups Target Aluminum Recovery
cards.body: Recycling startups are leveraging AI to improve recovery of critical minerals like aluminum. With aluminum prices up 20%, the market opportunity is growing significantly.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Identifies $200B AI CPU Market
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang predicts the next major growth opportunity is CPUs for AI agents worth $200 billion. This represents a significant new revenue stream for the chip giant.

cards.title: Anthropic Projects First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic has told investors it will more than double revenue to approximately $10.9 billion in Q2. The AI company is on track for its first profitable quarter.

cards.title: Clouted Raises $7M for Viral Video Clipping
cards.body: Video clipping startup Clouted raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures. The platform aims to remove guesswork from making short videos go viral.

cards.title: xAI Lost $6.4B in 2025, Plans Expansion
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI burned through $6.4 billion last year while planning a major Grok expansion. This offers the first public glimpse of Elon Musk's AI financials.

cards.title: Nvidia Posts Record Quarter, Holds $43B in Startups
cards.body: Nvidia announced another record revenue quarter and revealed $43 billion in startup holdings. The company forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

cards.title: xAI Commits $2.8B to Data Center Energy
cards.body: xAI will purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years, per SpaceX's IPO filing. The massive investment reflects the company's aggressive infrastructure expansion plans.

cards.title: Anthropic Pays xAI $1.25B Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI is selling compute to Anthropic for $1.25 billion per month. The partnership represents a major revenue stream for xAI's data center operations.

cards.title: OpenAI Solves 80-Year-Old Geometry Problem
cards.body: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Prominent mathematicians have verified the result, lending credibility after previous embarrassing claims.

cards.title: IrisGo Launches Andrew Ng-Backed AI Desktop Assistant
cards.body: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, introduced an AI desktop assistant that learns user tasks automatically. The tool watches desktop activity and automates repetitive workflows.

cards.title: OpenAI Accelerates IPO Plans for September Launch
cards.body: OpenAI is accelerating IPO preparations following Elon Musk's lawsuit loss. The company is reportedly targeting a September IPO launch.

cards.title: Spotify and Universal Music Strike AI Cover Deal
cards.body: Spotify is partnering with Universal Music Group to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists will receive a share of the revenue from these creations.

cards.title: Google Transforms Search with AI Overview Features
cards.body: Google is overhauling its search engine with expanded AI overview capabilities. If you're not already seeing these changes, prepare for a significantly different search experience.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump delayed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as the reason.

cards.title: Spotify Launches AI-Powered Podcast Q&A Features
cards.body: Spotify now lets users generate daily or weekly briefs from podcasts based on custom prompts. The AI-powered feature enhances podcast discovery and personalization.

cards.title: Spotify Releases NotebookLM Competitor App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop app as a research preview in over 20 markets. The app competes directly with Google's NotebookLM for research and note-taking workflows.

cards.title: Spotify Launches ElevenLabs-Powered Audiobook Tool
cards.body: Spotify released an AI-powered audiobook generation tool that uses ElevenLabs technology. Authors retain full rights and can publish generated audiobooks anywhere without exclusivity contracts.

cards.title: The Path Offers Safer AI Mental Health Therapy
cards.body: Founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, The Path developed an AI model scoring 95 on the Vera-MH mental health safety benchmark. This significantly outperforms consumer AI chatbots, which score a maximum of 65.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI Interface
cards.body: Hark plans to release multimodal AI models this summer powering a personal AI platform. The startup expects to follow with dedicated hardware devices built for these systems.

cards.title: Google Pitches Confusing AI Agent Ecosystem
cards.body: Google introduced AI agents as a new way for consumers to use the web at I/O. While promising, the concept left many attendees confused about practical applications.

cards.title: AI-Powered Recycling Startups Target Critical Minerals
cards.body: Recycling startups are using AI to improve recovery of critical minerals like aluminum. With aluminum prices up 20%, AI optimization could unlock massive value from recycling.

cards.title: Nvidia CEO Identifies $200B AI Agent CPU Market
cards.body: Jensen Huang predicts a brand new $200 billion market for Nvidia in AI agent CPUs. This represents the next major growth opportunity for the semiconductor giant.

cards.title: Anthropic Forecasts First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic told investors it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in Q2. The AI company is on track for its first profitable quarter.

cards.title: xAI Burned $6.4B Last Year, Plans Expansion
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning massive Grok expansion. The filing offers the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials.

cards.title: OpenAI Claims to Solve 80-Year-Old Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI says its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Mathematicians who previously exposed OpenAI's errors are backing up this new claim.

cards.title: Andrew Ng-Backed IrisGo Becomes AI Desktop Buddy
cards.body: IrisGo is an AI butler that watches users' desktops and automatically learns their tasks. The startup aims to become an indispensable AI desktop assistant.

cards.title: OpenAI Barrels Toward September IPO Plans
cards.body: OpenAI is reportedly preparing for an IPO that may happen in September. This comes a day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit threatening OpenAI's structure.

cards.title: Anthropic's Code with Claude Shows Coding Future
cards.body: Anthropic's developer event in London showcased how Claude is transforming software development. The company demonstrated AI's expanding role in the coding workflow.

cards.title: Google I/O Reveals AI-Driven Science Path Shift
cards.body: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis proclaimed we're 'standing in the foothills of the singularity' during Google I/O. The keynote highlighted how AI is reshaping scientific discovery.

cards.title: World Models Reshape AI Understanding Debate
cards.body: AI companies are building systems to understand the external world beyond LLM limitations. World models have become central to overcoming current AI constraints.

cards.title: Anthropic Code with Claude Redefines Developer Future
cards.body: Anthropic's two-day developer event in London showcased how Claude is revolutionizing software development. The strong vibes reflected growing AI adoption in coding workflows.

cards.title: xAI Signs $1.25B Monthly Compute Deal with Anthropic
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI struck a surprising deal to sell compute to Anthropic. The agreement is worth $1.25 billion per month over the contract term.

cards.title: xAI Buying $2.8B in Natural Gas Turbines
cards.body: xAI announced plans to purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years. The massive infrastructure investment shows Musk's commitment to AI expansion.

cards.title: Nvidia Posts Record Quarter, Reveals Startup Holdings
cards.body: Nvidia announced record revenue but forecasted slower growth in the following quarter. The company also revealed $43 billion in holdings across AI startup investments.
